use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF OVERACTIVE BLADDER WITH SYMPTOMS OF URGE URINARY INCONTINENCE, URGENCY, AND FREQUENCY

indications.text:
Toviaz® is a muscarinic antagonist indicated for the treatment of overactive bladder with symptoms of urge
urinary incontinence, urgency, and frequency.

Toviaz® is a muscarinic antagonist indicated for the treatment of overactive bladder with symptoms of urge
urinary incontinence, urgency, and frequency.

1.1 Adult Overactive Bladder
Toviaz is indicated for the treatment of overactive bladder (OAB) in adults with symptoms of urge urinary
incontinence, urgency, and frequency.
1.2 Pediatric Neurogenic Detrusor Overactivity
Toviaz is indicated for the treatment of neurogenic detrusor overactivity (NDO) ...
